creator: patrick@limetreeclose.org.uk
text:
Any file down loaded from a site served by this httpd server is tuncated to a maximum length of 1 MB.

Ihave seen this on FBSB 10.3 I386 with mini_httpd 1.21 and
                on FBSB 10.3 AMD64 with mini_httpd 1.25

Modifing the soucre and changing the MAX_SEND_BUFFER_SIZE constant changes the size the truncation occurs at.
